name: retold
description: The pict and fable node ecosystem.
author: Steven Velozo <steven@velozo.com> (http://velozo.com/)

brand.Name: Retold
brand.Tagline: What is software if not a tool to tell stories.
brand.Icon:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 96 96" width="96" height="96">
		<defs>
			<clipPath id="frame-retold-filled-light">
				<path d="M 48.00 2.00 L 87.84 25.00 L 87.84 71.00 L 48.00 94.00 L 8.16 71.00 L 8.16 25.00 Z"/>
			</clipPath>
		</defs>
		<path d="M 48.00 2.00 L 87.84 25.00 L 87.84 71.00 L 48.00 94.00 L 8.16 71.00 L 8.16 25.00 Z" fill="#4e35b8"/>
		<g clip-path="url(#frame-retold-filled-light)"><rect x="20" y="20" width="56" height="56" rx="8" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.18)"/>
					<path d="M 48 30 L 70 48 L 48 66 L 26 48 Z" fill="#e1c936"/></g>
		<text x="48" y="50" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central"
			font-family="-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif"
			font-size="56" font-weight="700"
			fill="#ffffff" letter-spacing="-1">R</text>
	</svg>
